content: User asked to commit and push the slack-cc-bot adapter fix and open a LobeHub PR to canary. Pushed slack-cc-bot commit aca8bca (🐛 fix(codex): keep runtime files outside workspaces) to origin/main. Created LobeHub branch fix/mobile-agent-topic-route, pushed it, and opened PR #14158 to canary fixing mobile /agent/:aid/:topicId routing and linking issue #14152.

After completing commits, slack-cc-bot still has unrelated local changes in .claude/skills/writing-live-e2e-tests/SKILL.md and untracked apps/kagura/src/e2e/live/run-codex-memory-activity.ts. LobeHub branch fix/mobile-agent-topic-route only has untracked .kagura runtime files left in the working tree.
